summary: Completed frontend testing of Meeting Mode and Navigation Restructure features. All features verified: 1) Meeting Mode toggle visible in Adviser Mode sidebar, 2) Meeting Mode banner shows 'MEETING MODE - Live data updates paused' when active, 3) Client Portal has exactly 3 tabs (Overview, Investments, Actions), 4) Client Portal Overview shows Net Worth Summary and Retirement Confidence, 5) Client Portal Actions shows Goals, Pending Actions, Recent Documents, 6) Navigation restructured with client-specific groups: Overview (Net Worth, Retirement, Health Score, Client 360) → Planning (Retirement Planner, Scenarios, Goals, Actions, Tax Analysis) → Investments (Shares & ETFs, Fixed Income, Property, Managed Funds, Alternatives) → Documents.

issues: Net Worth Summary shows $0 in the card but $3,040,000 in the welcome banner - possible API data mismatch or different data sources

context_for_next_testing_agent: Meeting Mode and Navigation Restructure features complete. Key pages tested: /advisor-command-center (Meeting Mode toggle in Adviser Mode sidebar), /client-portal (3 tabs: Overview, Investments, Actions), /client-360 (client-specific navigation with Overview → Planning → Investments → Documents groups). Meeting Mode toggle shows 'Enter Meeting Mode' when off and 'Meeting Mode ON' when active. Banner shows amber background with 'MEETING MODE - Live data updates paused • Manual scenario changes only'.
